title: Candle Mirror with 5 Candles
features: ENDLESS REFLECTIONS - Elegant unidirectional mirrors create a fascinating infinity effect from any angle, turning your room into an enchanting candlelight reflection.
Universal Compatibility - Designed to work with standard candles, flameless votives and hurricane candles, giving you full flexibility to safely create the desired atmosphere.
EASY ACCESS DESIGN The removable glass box allows for quick placement and lighting of the candles, while the secure grooves on the fireproof MDF base keep the candles firmly in place.
STUNNING CENTRE POINT - An eye-catcher at weddings, celebrations and special events with this sophisticated mirror display that multiplies candlelight in a dazzling visual shop window.
SAFE CONSTRUCTION Made of fireproof materials and precise candle placement, which provides peace of mind and creates magical lighting effects.
description: Infinite Elegance Turn any room into a fascinating visualization with the AlyMack Infinity Mirror. The unidirectional HD mirrors create a stunning light tunnel that spreads endlessly and enchants guests from every angle. The fireproof base holds your choice of tea light, votive or hurricane candles, while the removable glass box ensures easy lighting and maintenance. This sophisticated centerpiece highlights weddings, dinners and special occasions. Versatile lighting. Discover the enchanting shine of the ALYMACK Infinity Mirror candle holder with your favourite light source. Compatible with traditional and flameless candles. This versatile table decoration meets the demands of anywhere. The precisely designed candle slots fit into standard chandeliers, votive and hurricane candles, providing flexibility without compromising the stunning reflective effect. DESIGNED FOR DISTINCTIVITY The ALYMACK Infinity Mirror combines innovative design with practical functionality. Specialized unidirectional mirrors create an immersive depth effect that attracts attention and awakens conversations. The durable MDF base provides stability while maintaining an elegant profile. The removable glass plates simplify maintenance, making this centrepiece as practical as it is an eye-catcher. - Create an illusion of infinite reflection for dramatic screens. Fits multiple types of candles, including flameless options. High-resolution unidirectional mirrors provide crystal clear reflections. Easy to clean removable glass panels. Durable base with precision cut candle slots
